mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY ( EMERGENCY_NO, PERSON_ID, EMER_NAME, EMER_PHONE, EMER_PHONE_SECOND, EMER_EMAIL, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, EMER_ADDRESS, EMER_TYPE_CODE, ACTIVITY, MOBILE_PHONE, NATIONALITY, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, EMER_CELLPHONE, EMER_WORK_PHONE, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( #{emergencyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerPhoneSecond, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainLiaisonOffice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{mobilePhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{updateEmergencyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{essTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerCellphone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerWorkPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isEmergencyAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT EMERGENCY_NO, PERSON_ID, EMER_NAME, EMER_PHONE, EMER_PHONE_SECOND, EMER_EMAIL, MAIN_LIAISON_OFFICE, EMER_ADDRESS, EMER_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(EMER_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS EMER_TYPE_NAME, ACTIVITY, MOBILE_PHONE, NATIONALITY, APPLY_TYPE, UPDATE_EMERGENCY_NO, ESS_TYPE_CODE, EMER_CELLPHONE, EMER_WORK_PHONE, ISEMERGENCYADDRESS, EARROR, CALLBACK FROM HR_EMERGENCY_ADDRESS_APPLY WHERE EMERGENCY_NO = #{emergencyNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
